texto: What sets you apart from everyone else is your ability to dig deep when you’ve got nothing left. When you are broken, lost, exhausted. When you want to pack it all in and call it a day. That’s when you will find your strength. Find out who you are and what you are made of. And I guarantee you that when your body gives up and you are lying in a heap, your fucking heart will carry you the rest of the way.
explicacao: Citação de T. Gephart sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “What sets you apart from everyone else is your ability to dig deep when you’ve got nothing left. …” articula amor, fighting, esperanca em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como esperanca e strength.
